title: Craft a Personalized Email for a Customer Welcome Program
scenario: Develop a personalized email for a customer welcome program that includes a unique offer, product information, and a clear call-to-action. The email should be concise, professional, and include a personalized greeting. The email should be under 250 words, written in a friendly tone, and include relevant product information.
constraints: Should include a unique offer related to the product

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the email, ensuring it is friendly and professional.
Check if the email is under 250 words.
Verify that the email includes a unique offer related to the product.
